scripts.docker:run: cd .. && docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file runtime/.env -e OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/app convos-runtime:local
scripts.build:run: cd .. && docker build -f runtime/harness/openclaw/Dockerfile -t convos-runtime:local . && docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file runtime/.env -e OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/app convos-runtime:local
scripts.build:run:hermes: cd .. && docker build -f runtime/harness/hermes/Dockerfile -t convos-runtime-hermes:local . && docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file runtime/.env convos-runtime-hermes:local
